title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at MSC India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at MSC India
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Fleet Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!
